note: Pennsylvania expanded Medicaid. Adults up to 138% FPL qualify for Medicaid (Healthy PA). PA also has CHIP up to 314% FPL.

programs.name: SNAP (Pennsylvania)
programs.description: Pennsylvania administers federal SNAP benefits. Apply online through COMPASS.

application.where: compass.state.pa.us or local County Assistance Office

required_documents: Proof of income (pay stubs, employer letter)
Social Security numbers for all household members

programs.name: Pennsylvania Medicaid (MA)
programs.description: Pennsylvania expanded Medicaid covers adults up to 138% FPL. Children covered up to 314% FPL through CHIP. No premium for most enrollees.

monthly_benefit_range.note: No premium for most enrollees. Full health coverage including dental and vision for children.

income.note: Pennsylvania expanded Medicaid — most adults up to 138% FPL qualify.

programs.name: TANF — Pennsylvania (LIAF/TANF)
programs.full_name: Temporary Assistance for Needy Families — Pennsylvania
programs.description: Pennsylvania's TANF program (called TANF Cash Assistance) provides monthly payments to families with children. Maximum for a family of 3 is approximately $422/month.

eligibility_rules.who: Families with children under 18 (or 19 if in school)

income.note: Must be below income limits; work requirements apply for most adults

application.where: compass.state.pa.us or local County Assistance Office
